issues.title: Missing Error Handling in Ingestion Command
issues.details: The ingestion command lacks comprehensive error handling, particularly in the upsert process. This could lead to data loss or corruption if an error occurs during batch processing. Suggested fix: Implement try-catch blocks around critical operations and ensure that errors are logged and handled gracefully. File: .claude/commands/ingest.md:3-5.

issues.title: Potential Path Traversal in Feature Requests
issues.details: The feature request command allows for file paths that could lead to path traversal vulnerabilities. Ensure that the input paths are sanitized and validated against a whitelist of acceptable paths. File: .claude/commands/features.md:10-12.

issues.title: Lack of Unit Tests for New Logic
issues.details: The new logic for handling user requests does not have associated unit tests, which is critical for ensuring correctness and safety. Suggested fix: Add unit tests that cover various scenarios, including edge cases. File: .claude/commands/handle-user-request.md:1-5.

issues.title: Inconsistent Commit Message Format
issues.details: The commit message format is not consistently followed across commands, which can lead to confusion. Suggested fix: Standardize the commit message format as per the guidelines outlined in the documentation. File: .claude/commands/pre-run-sync.md:4-5.

summary: The overall code quality shows several areas for improvement, particularly in error handling, security, and testing. Addressing these issues is crucial for maintaining a robust and secure application.
